This interplay between objective and subjective elements makes beauty a complex and multifaceted concept. Considering my background in both my Native American heritage and my current work and studies, I recognize the importance of both universal standards and personal interpretations. Therefore, I would place 'Beautifulness' around the midpoint of the spectrum, acknowledging the role of both objective and subjective factors in defining beauty.
